mustRead.title: Skills Are Not Islands: Measuring Dependency and Risk in Agent Skill Supply Chains
mustRead.whyItMatters: Agent skills package reusable operational knowledge for Large Language Model (LLM) agents, yet as they grow in scope,... Read it as a research lead for multi agent systems, with the paper as the ground truth before any downstream commentary.
mustRead.brief: This paper is a multi agent systems lead from the research stream. Agent skills package reusable operational knowledge for Large Language Model (LLM) agents, yet as they grow in scope, they become dependency-bearing artifacts whose identities, versions, and provenance remain implicit.
